task_description: Implement v1.4 for Darts Liga: extended analytics (tournaments/players), new import formats (CSV/JSON/clipboard), configurable reports with templates, multi-profile support, interactive user guide, and UX automation (shortcuts, toasts, undo, drag-drop, session state).

verification.summary: mypy clean (56 source files). 214 tests pass, 80 skipped (GUI), 14 deselected. All 6 features implemented with comprehensive tests. No regressions from baseline 151 tests.
